subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath manifested and revealed whatsoever He hath desired. Verily, He is the All-Powerful One Whom the conditions of creation have not hindered, the Self-Subsisting [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان من ظهر و اظهر ما اراد انه لهو المقتدر الذی مامنعته شئونات الخلق و القیوم
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @wisdom [hikmat]
